era_context: The Old Kingdom of Egypt is in the Fourth Dynasty. Mesopotamia is in the Early Dynastic Period III. The Indus Valley Civilization is in its mature phase. Traditional Chinese chronology places the Xia Dynasty in this period.
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified for events listed.
historiographic_note: The year -2443 is not attested in any known historical source. No specific events are documented. The historical record is silent for this year, as it is for the vast majority of ancient years.
